summary: Tested all 9 features for the PlayStation-style trophy cabinet overhaul. All features working correctly: (1) Mobile header has no hamburger - PASS, (2) Footer nav has 5 tabs including Menu - PASS, (3) Achievements panel shows PlayStation-style trophy cabinet - PASS, (4) Trophy groups visibility based on active count - PASS, (5) Trophy disable/enable toggle - PASS, (6) Disabled trophy count decreases - PASS, (7) Tier visibility correct for rafael's 10 trophies - PASS, (8) Nav label shows 'Trophies' - PASS, (9) Desktop sidebar shows trophy count out of 44 - PASS

issues: Minor: The translation key is still 'nav.medals' but displays 'Trophies' - consider renaming key to 'nav.trophies' for code clarity

critical_code_review_comments: AchievementsPanel.jsx: Well-implemented PlayStation-style trophy cabinet with proper tier breakdown (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum)
gamification.js: ACHIEVEMENTS array correctly has tier and group fields, GROUP_THRESHOLDS properly defined (1:0, 2:7, 3:14, 4:21)
useStore.js: DISABLE_TROPHY/ENABLE_TROPHY actions properly implemented with disabledTrophies array in state
Navbar.jsx: Mobile header correctly shows only avatar+name on left and section label on right, no hamburger button
Navbar.jsx: Bottom nav correctly has 5 tabs (Today, Habits, TARS, Trophies, Menu) with Menu opening the drawer
seed_data_creation: None - used existing rafael account with 10 pre-earned trophies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trophy cabinet overhaul is complete and working. Rafael has 10 earned trophies: first_step, on_fire, week_warrior, habit_builder, consistent, unstoppable, fifty_done, double_century, bjj_white_1, meals_week. With 10 active trophies, Tier 1 (10 trophies) and Tier 2 (10 trophies) are fully visible, Tier 3 shows partial (only earned trophies like bjj_white_1), Tier 4 is locked (needs 21 trophies). Trophy toggle works - clicking 'Ativo' changes to 'Desativado' and count decreases from 10 to 9. The nav label correctly shows 'Trophies' (not 'Medals'). Desktop sidebar shows '10/44' trophy count.

features_tested.mobile_header_no_hamburger: PASS - Header shows avatar+name on left, section label on right, no hamburger button
features_tested.footer_nav_5_tabs: PASS - Today, Habits, TARS, Trophies, Menu tabs all present
features_tested.achievements_panel_playstation_style: PASS - Shows trophy cabinet with summary card (count/44, tier breakdown, perfect streak)
features_tested.trophy_groups_visibility: PASS - Tier 1 & 2 visible, Tier 3 partial (shows earned), Tier 4 locked
features_tested.trophy_disable_enable: PASS - Toggle button shows 'Ativo'/'Desativado', state changes correctly
features_tested.disabled_trophy_count: PASS - Count decreased from 10/44 to 9/44 when trophy disabled
features_tested.tier_visibility_rafael: PASS - With 10 trophies: Tier 1 full, Tier 2 full, Tier 3 partial, Tier 4 locked
